parts.text:
"Benchmark task: feature-add-small
Repository: https://github.com/honojs/hono.git

Add title-case support to bench-targets/feature/src/formatTitle.mjs using the existing mode-based pattern. Read bench-targets/feature/src/formatTitle.mjs and bench-targets/feature/formatTitle.test.mjs first. Do not add dependencies. Verify with node --test bench-targets/feature/formatTitle.test.mjs.

Constraints:
- Do not ask the user to write prompts or inspect files manually.
- Prefer the smallest safe code change when edits are required.
- Include exact file paths, commands run, and verification status in the final answer."
Let me start by reading the files mentioned in the task to understand the existing pattern and requirements.

2:   if (mode === 'upper') return value.toUpperCase()
3:   if (mode === 'lower') return value.toLowerCase()
4:   return value
5: }
</content>
state.title: bench-targets/feature/src/formatTitle.mjs

<path>bench-targets/feature/formatTitle.test.mjs</path>
<content>
1: import test from 'node:test'
2: import assert from 'node:assert/strict'
3: import { formatTitle } from './src/formatTitle.mjs'
4: 
5: test('formatTitle supports title case mode', () => {
6:   assert.equal(formatTitle('hello benchmark world', 'title'), 'Hello Benchmark World')
7:   assert.equal(formatTitle('LOUD', 'lower'), 'loud')
8: })
</content>
